faq.question: Why is a resume website better than PDF?
faq.answer: Resume website is more interactive, easier to share, looks more modern, and demonstrates the candidate's digital skills. Employers more often click on links than open files.

faq.question: Can I use a resume website for freelancing?
faq.answer: Yes, it's an excellent self-presentation tool. Personal page works as a service showcase and portfolio simultaneously.

faq.question: Is the resume website visible in search?
faq.answer: By default, the site is search-optimized. You can hide it from indexing if you want only people with the link to see it.

faq.question: Can I add a portfolio to the resume page?
faq.answer: Yes. Add links to projects, GitHub, Behance, work examples — everything that confirms your experience and skills.

faq.question: What is Promto?
faq.answer: Promto is an AI website builder. You describe yourself, and the system creates a personal page with texts and design in minutes.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a resume website?
faq.answer: You can create a resume website for free. Paid plans allow connecting your own domain and removing Promto branding.
